items.text:
**🎬 CREW & SCHAUSPIELER GESUCHT — Psychological Horror Kurzfilm (Festivalprojekt)  **

Hallo zusammen,  

für meinen ersten eigenen Kurzfilm (ca. 15 Min.) suche ich eine kleine, engagierte Crew sowie Darsteller:innen im Raum Bayern.

Ziel ist ein atmosphärischer Festivalfilm, der mit begrenzten Mitteln hochwertig umgesetzt wird.  

📍 Drehort: Roßlach (Franken, Bayern) — außergewöhnliche Innenlocation  

📅 2–3 kompakte Drehtage (Termin flexibel)  

💰 No/Low Budget (Verpflegung + Fahrtkosten nach Absprache)  

🏆 Festival-Einreichungen 

🎬 Starkes Showreel-Material  

---

🩸 **STORY (kurz)  **

Eine Jugendliche nimmt nachts eine streunende Katze mit nach Hause.  

Am nächsten Morgen ist sie verschwunden — stattdessen befindet sich mitten im Wohnzimmer ein...  

Während Familie und Geistliche versuchen zu begreifen, was geschehen ist, wird klar:  

Etwas wurde nicht begraben — sondern festgehalten.  

Atmosphärischer Horror, stark schauspielgetrieben, Fokus auf Spannung und Bildsprache statt Effekte.

---

**🎥 BESONDERS GESUCHT: KAMERA / DoP ** 

Der Film lebt von Licht, Bewegung und Atmosphäre — keine Effekt-Show.  

• Erfahrung mit Innenraum-Lichtsetzung  

• Gefühl für Spannung statt Jumpscares  

• Eigenes Equipment von Vorteil  

• Interesse an visuell starkem Erzählen  

---

**🎬 WEITERE CREW  **

• Set-Ton  

• Licht / Gaffer  

• Produktionsassistenz  

• Maske (auch Einsteiger willkommen)  

• Motivierte Allrounder  

• Unterstützung in Postproduktion / Organisation willkommen  

---

🎭 SCHAUSPIELER:INNEN  

• Jugendliche Rolle (w / ca. 15–18)  

• Erwachsene Rollen (Mutter 50-55, Pfarrer 30-35, Imam 55-65)  

Intensive, emotional starke Szenen.

---

🧠 **WAS MIR WICHTIG IST  **

✔️ Zuverlässigkeit und Teamgeist  

✔️ Interesse an einem ernsthaft umgesetzten Indie-Projekt  

✔️ Kreativer Input ausdrücklich erwünscht  

✔️ Gerne auch Menschen, die das Projekt bis zur Festivalphase begleiten möchten  

---

Wenn du Interesse hast, schreib mir gern eine PN mit kurzer Vorstellung

Empfehlungen oder Weiterleitungen sind ebenfalls willkommen 🙏  

#CrewCall #FilmcrewGesucht #Kurzfilm #Horrorfilm  

#DoP #KameraGesucht #SchauspielerGesucht  

#IndieFilm #Festivalfilm #Filmstudenten  

#Bamberg #oberfranken

items.text:
Hi,

We are looking for a female actor to play a therapist in an exciting new pilot project. Filming will take place for one day in the second week of March.

We’re seeking someone aged between 40 and 60 to portray a calm, reassuring character.

Please DM me for more information.🤓

Location : central London

As this is currently an independent pilot, the fee is modest. However, you’ll be working with a fantastic team, and all reasonable expenses will be covered.

Our penultimate Panto Performance of `The Elves & The Shoe Maker' was performed at the beautiful Criterion Theatre on Saturday in Blue Town on the Isle of Sheppey. 

WE loved our second time at this theatre the Criterion Blue Town is a theatre, cinema, music hall and museum and is truly a hidden gem by the seaside!  

We only have 1 performance left now of this wonderfully funny family Panto on :- 

**Sat 28th Feb at 3pm at St. Barnabas Church, **Istead Rise -

If you haven't seen it this is your last chance - Call:- Pauline 07729596567.

sharedPost.text:
Razem możemy więcej – Szukamy Sponsorów i Ludzi Dobrej Woli dla Natalki
Zwracam się do Państwa z prośbą o pomoc dla mojej córeczki, Natalki. Gdy miała dwa latka, usłyszeliśmy diagnozę, która zmieniła nasze życie na zawsze – autyzm. Nasza codzienność to nieustanna walka o jej rozwój, komunikację i lepszą przyszłość.
Natalia wymaga wielospecjalistycznej opieki. Każdy nasz dzień to intensywne terapie i zajęcia w specjalistycznym przedszkolu. Niestety, koszty leczenia i rehabilitacji są ogromne – sięgają około 3500 zł miesięcznie. Jest to kwota, która przekracza nasze możliwości, przez co z bólem serca musieliśmy zrezygnować z części zajęć, takich jak basen czy hipoterapia, które tak bardzo jej pomagały.
Wiem jedno: nie możemy się poddać. Przerwy w terapii powodują, że Natalka się cofa, a my chcemy dać jej szansę na jak największą samodzielność.
Szukamy Sponsorów, firm oraz osób prywatnych, które zechciałyby wesprzeć Natalkę w jej drodze po sprawność. Każda pomoc, każde udostępnienie tego ogłoszenia lub wsparcie finansowe przybliża nas do powrotu na utracone zajęcia i daje nadzieję na lepsze jutro dla mojej córki.
Wierzę, że dobro wraca. Dziękujemy za każdą pomoc

items.text:
ZAPISY TRWAJĄ - **TEDDY'S ARMY DANCE STUDIO** w Tarnowie to OSTATNI MOMENT, aby dołączyć do naszych grup otwartych w tym sezonie! 💥

Jeśli chcesz, aby Twoje dziecko (lub Ty!) mogło w kolejnym sezonie kontynuować naukę już w **grupach zamkniętych**, to najlepszy czas, by rozpocząć swoją taneczną przygodę z nami! 🖤

✨Grupy otwarte:
- **BĄBELKI** (4–6 lat)
- **NEW AGE KIDS** (7–9 lat oraz 10–12 lat)
- **SISTERS OPEN** (13+)

✨

📲 **Jak się zapisać?**
Wyślij SMS na numer **533 600 032** o treści:
👉 *imię i nazwisko + wiek dziecka + Tarnów*

Nie zwlekaj – dołącz do #TeddysArmy i stań się częścią naszej tanecznej EKIPY! 🐻🔥

ZAPISY TRWAJĄ - **TEDDY'S ARMY DANCE STUDIO** w Tarnowie to OSTATNI MOMENT, aby dołączyć do naszych grup otwartych w tym sezonie! 💥

Jeśli chcesz, aby Twoje dziecko (lub Ty!) mogło w kolejnym sezonie kontynuować naukę już w **grupach zamkniętych**, to najlepszy czas, by rozpocząć swoją taneczną przygodę z nami! 🖤

✨Grupy otwarte:
- **BĄBELKI** (4–6 lat)
- **NEW AGE KIDS** (7–9 lat oraz 10–12 lat)
- **SISTERS OPEN** (13+)

✨

📲 **Jak się zapisać?**
Wyślij SMS na numer **533 600 032** o treści:
👉 *imię i nazwisko + wiek dziecka + Tarnów*

Nie zwlekaj – dołącz do #TeddysArmy i stań się częścią naszej tanecznej EKIPY! 🐻🔥

items.title: Female presenter needed 🎥

items.text:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Shaun Daly and I currently in early development of producing a brand-new TV show titled ‘LOCAL TALENT’. Written and to be directed the talented Bethany McGiveron. The show is set in a town in the North West of England, where in a working-class neighbourhood, a brothel disguised as a “sauna” to the public resides. Within this brothel, we follow the group of women who own, manage and work there. All of whom are an array of characters who get along like a chosen family that will do whatever they can for each other. Helping one another to survive in this modern world that they are all struggling to survive in and catch moments of joy that life is meant to bring to them. 

The show is inspired a little by the Channel 4 documentary A Very British Brothel, along with stories and accounts of people who have worked in the industry. Stories and accounts we are still researching into now. The vibe and tone of the show is a drama/comedy like the likes of the UK Shameless and Brassic to name some examples. It is a show about together, positivity, banter amongst what the characters would consider are their chosen family. However, along with that, each character has their own personal conflicts, struggles, secrets and desperation for survival.

Our plan is to create a pitch package for the series, by producing the pilot episode. Looking to be around 45 to an hour maximum. We are currently in pre-production and are looking to film around the North West, anywhere from Wirral, Liverpool, St Helens and further if necessary.

What we are looking for is talented actors and actresses from around the North West who would be interested in playing the roles below. Warning that the show will explore themes of a sexual nature along with themes of survival and togetherness. Characters will be dressing up in sexy attire for clients and be performing suggestive positions, simulated sexual content and light fetish comedy as well. No intention of nudity to be involved.

If you’re comfortable with this, then please see the roles below and email shaundaly2510@gmail.com:

**CHELSEA**

Female, 30s,

Curvy, expressive, intimidating and hilarious. A dominatrix with sharp wit and a soft interior she hides well. Natural scouser who has moved away from her past in Liverpool and has found a home working as the Dominatrix of the brothel. Confident, funny, a strong presence within the Brothel.

**LYDIA**

Female, 30s – 40s.

Main villain of Series 1. Sharp, polished, cold underneath. Controlling, emotionally volatile. Very manipulative. Knows her beauty can seduce and make slaves of those who fall under her spell. Character will be exploring themes of domestic violence.

**SHIRLEY**

Female, late 30s – early 40s.

Body Positive, full figured, curvy, tom boyish character. Short practical hair. Dry humour and fiercely loyal. Childhood best friend of Tammy.

**TAMMY**

Female, late 30s – early 40s.

Body Positive, full figured, voluptuous, bubbly, girly, cheerful. Loyal, excitable, forms a comedic duo with Shirley. Warm and expressive. Can be nervous and frantic.

**BIG LIZ**

Trans masculine or non-binary performer, 40s – 50s.

Large frame, camp, emotional, theatrical. Switching between dramatic monologues and silly vulnerability. Use of masculine & feminine voice. Strong, comedic, like the mother hen of the group. With only the Manger Julie above them. Seen as second in command and protector of everyone who works for the Brothel.

**MARY** (Receptionist)

Female, 20s - 30s.

Receptionist of the Brothel. Organises all the clients, answers phones, sorts the lunches and evening meals, arranges the rotas for everyone working at the Brothel. She is small, gentle-looking, quietly stressed. The admin backbone of the brothel in the neat office that is seen when you walk in.

**ROSALINE**

Female, 30s.

Slim or average build, messy glamour, clearly exhausted. A touring girl whose unravelling emotional state becomes part of the plot. Mainly featured in the Pilot, may be planned to return for later episodes.

**BLOSSOM**

Female, Dark Skin Toned, late 30s–40s.

A Nigerian woman who works for the Brothel. She is elegant, expressive, deeply emotional. Balances trauma, fear, and warmth. She has come from a tough background and has come to the UK for a better life. For her, working at the Brothel is that better life, compared to the life she had back in Nigeria. She is kind and considerate, but still afraid to stand up for herself. Especially when it comes to her stalker Ade.

**ADE**

Male, dark skin tone, 40s - 50s.

Tall, intimidating, deeply unsettling. Stalker presence, threatening. Strong physical presence. Very smug and cocky. To the point of unbearable. 

**DARREN** (Blossom love interest)

Male, 30s–40s.

Short man, sweet, warm, confident but sensitive. Blossoms love interest and the opposite of Ade. Darren is in love with Blossom and is happy just to spend time with her and even wants to embrace her culture and be a part of her life. He is looked down upon and seen as too soft, especially from Ade. But there is more to Darren than meets the eye.

**NIGEL**

Male, late 30s–50s.

Soft, friendly, policeman. Awkward. Very innocent and naïve. Stuff that goes on in the brothel could be seen to make him feel uncomfortable. Good hearted individual.

**STEVE (Office Pennington, Policeman)**

Male, late 20s–30s.

Stiff, easily flustered police officer. Easily manipulated. Tries to act all hard and tough when he is just a pawn for a bigger scheme to be revealed later in the series. Entangled with Lydia.

topComments.text: This sounds brilliant. I’ll be sending an email in!

Casting for ‘The Urge' - a 5 minute short film, Thriller, university student project.

Shooting in and around Liverpool City Centre (specific location tbc), Local and nearby talent are encouraged to apply!

Further details for each role can be found in the individual listings/images below.

SUPPORTING

Tom- Male, playing age 18-25

'Vix'- Female, playing age 30-60

If interested, please contact M.McGrath@2024.ljmu.ac.uk stating the role in which you are interested, any prior experience, and a head shot.

items.text: Quick question — when you get sides and nobody's free to run lines with you, what do you do? I used to record the other character on my phone and play it back but the timing was always terrible lol. Curious what works for everyone else?

topComments.text: I use ColdRead is designed for this and helps act like a reader during self tapes too

When you record the other character... read the lines out loud for it (and maybe in a different tone/voice) and in your mind (silent) for your character... so the timing would line up nicely when you play back that audio and record your scene 😀

items.text:
Casting Call For Short Film
Genre: Psychological Drama

Logline: A respected working actor appears to have everything, career momentum, a loving family, and control over his life, until subtle cracks reveal he may be performing the very reality he refuses to confront. 

NATHAN (Lead) Male, 30s–40s. Mixed race (Black / White) A respected working actor balancing career and family or so it seems. Nathan is charismatic, steady, and deeply loved by those around him. He moves through the world with quiet confidence and competence. As the story unfolds, cracks begin to show. Beneath his professionalism is a man holding something unresolved and when that emotional weight surfaces, it does so in a raw, intimate way. This role requires an actor capable of subtle internal shifts and a contained but powerful emotional unraveling. The performance lives in the eyes as much as in dialogue. This is a lead role centered on emotional control and gradual unraveling. 

Email thewritecue@gmail.com for more information!

items.text:
KRAKÓW - STATYŚCI - 11.03-19.03

Witam,

Szukam statystów do projektu badawczego - nagrania służące uczeniu algorytmów w branży automotive. Uczestnicy są anonimowi, a nagrania jedynie do użytku wewnętrznego klienta.

Szukamy:
* Kobiet i mężczyzn w każdym wieku. **Stawka: **120 zł. Nagrania trwają 1,5h. 
* Kobiet i mężczyzn o pochodzeniu etnicznym, zwłaszcza azjatyckim.  **Stawka: **150 zł. Nagrania trwają 1,5h. 

**Gdzie: **Kraków, Powstańców Wielkopolskich.

**Kiedy: **każdy może wziąć udział jeden raz, między 11.03 a 19.03, w godz. 8:00-17:00. 

**Zgłoszenia **proszę przesyłać tylko poprzez formularz: https://forms.fillout.com/t/xdfx89Gtcnus

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Akcja! Ale tylko ta zaplanowana... 🚑
Na planie filmowym liczy się każda sekunda, perfekcyjne światło i skupienie ekipy. Nie ma miejsca na nieprzewidziane przerwy, a już na pewno nie te wynikające z problemów zdrowotnych.

W Rob-Rescue wiemy, że zabezpieczenie medyczne produkcji to coś więcej niż tylko obecność ratownika. To Twoja polisa ubezpieczeniowa na spokój i płynność pracy.

Dlaczego my?
Dyskrecja i mobilność: Jesteśmy cieniem ekipy. Nie wchodzimy w kadr, nie przeszkadzamy, ale jesteśmy tam, gdzie nas potrzebujecie.

Doświadczenie w „terenie”: Od hal zdjęciowych po trudne warunki plenerowe – nic nas nie zaskoczy.

Pełne wsparcie: Dbamy o wszystkich – od aktorów pierwszoplanowych po techników pracujących na wysokościach.

Zabezpieczamy kaskaderów, statystów i całą produkcję, abyście Wy mogli skupić się na tworzeniu magii kina. 🎥✨

Twoja produkcja zasługuje na profesjonalną opiekę.

Chcesz omówić szczegóły Twojego kolejnego projektu?
📩 Napisz do nas w wiadomości prywatnej!

#robrescue #zabezpieczeniemedyczne #filmset #planfilmowy #ratownikmedyczny #produkcjafilmowa #kino #bezpieczeństwo #setlife

items.text:
OPTAGELSER I JYLLAND PÅ DE BEDSTE FAMILIER - NY DATO 

Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (DR) søges personer over 20 år til forskellige statistroller med optagelse i Jylland, men med kostume/sminke dag i Skovlunde på Sjælland et tidsrum ml. 10-17.

Produktionen dækker: 

1. Bro og benzin fra Jylland/Fyn til Skovlunde og retur.  Alternativt en lavpris færgeovergang t/r tilsvarende prisen for broafgift.

2. En lavpris bus- eller togbillet. Der kører offentlige bus fra Skovlunde st. til adressen i Mileparken.

Derudover er der et personligt honorar for kostume/sminkedagen samt et tilpasset antal optagedage.

Følgende statistroller er ledige på optagelsesdage i dagstimerne:

Optagelsesdag 10/3 nær Stenbjerg Jylland og kostume/sminkeprøve 26/2 i Skovlunde Sjælland:
2 mandlige fiskere og 2 fiskekoner
Der er til hver 800 kr. honorar for 1 optagedage og 800 kr. honorar for 1 sminke/kostumedag.

Optagelsesdag 11/3 Hurup Thy Jylland, 18/3 Mariager Jylland + kostume/sminkeprøve 27/2 i Skovlunde Sjælland:
3 mandlige arbejdere Cheminova
Der er 1600 kr. honorar for 2 optagedage og 800 kr. honorar for 1 sminke/kostumedag.

Optagelsesdag 12/3 nær Agger Jylland, 18/3 Mariager Jylland + kostume/sminkeprøve 27/2 i Skovlunde Sjælland:
2 mandlige arbejdere og laboranter Cheminova
Der er 1600 kr. honorar for 2 optagedage og 800 kr. honorar for 1 sminke/kostumedag.

Der er mulighed for gratis anvist parkering i Skovlunde til kostume/sminkeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport dækkes ikke på optagelsesdage.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 187, tøjstr. S-L, ingen synlige tatoveringer med t-shirt og shorts på eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, hårlængde min. 5 cm så der f.eks. kan laves sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg

KVINDER:
max højde 175, tøjstr. S-L, ingen synlige tatoveringer inkl. eyeliner og bryn eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, ingen farvet striber, hårlængde fra kort til skulderlangt med mindre du er okay med at blive klippet af professionel frisør i sminken, ingen synligt falske negle eller øjenvipper.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com med emne: STATIST JYLLAND:

navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.

Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

Oplys hvilken mulighed du har for at komme over til kostume/sminkeprøven og forventet pris.

God dag.

items.text:
**KORTFILM**

*VI SØGER EN KVINDE OG EN MAND I ALDEREN 19 TIL 25 ÅR TIL OPTAGELSER DEN 11. OG 12. APRIL 2026*

Vi kommer fra Den Danske Ungdomsfilmskole (Station Next Aarhus), hvor vi skal i gang med vores hovedproduktion. Det drejer sig om en komediekortfilm, som optages i foråret 2026.

Filmen handler om en mand, der forsøger at redde sit forhold, efter han har glemt at købe en årsdagsgave til sin kæreste.

Du bedes sende et selftape ud fra instruktionerne under den rolle, du søger. Manuskriptet sendes ved henvendelse.

Selftape behøver ikke være teknisk avanceret. En simpel optagelse på telefon er helt fint.

**Løn:**

Rollerne er ulønnede, men transport og forplejning dækkes.

**Optagelser:**

Optagedagene er planlagt som heldagsproduktioner begge dage.
Optagelserne finder sted i Aarhus og omegn.

**Roller:**

**Lukas:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Lukas er en ynkelig mand, der ofte hopper over, hvor gærdet er lavest, men som vil gøre alt for at redde sit forhold.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 35 samt replik 9 til 14.

**Sofie:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Sofie er realistisk og tror på, at et forhold kræver tid og energi.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 37 og ned til slutningen.

**Deadline:**

Deadline for selftape er 28. februar 2026.
Vi afholder fysisk casting den 7. marts 2026.

**Ansøgning:**

Ansøgningen sendes til Nikoline på
**nfischermikkelsen@gmail.com**

items.text:
🎬 **SEEKING SFX MAKEUP / PRACTICAL FX ARTIST — FEATURE FILM (GEORGIA)**

**LAKE OF THE BROKENHEARTED**

**Genre:** Indie Horror / Psychological Thriller

**Status:** NON-SAG / NON-UNION FEATURE

📍 **Location:** North Georgia (Blue Ridge / Atlanta area)

📆 **Shoot Duration:** 18 days (April 2026)

🏠 **Lodging & Meals Provided During Filming**

🎥 **Small, focused, professional indie crew**

**🔥 PROJECT OVERVIEW**

We are seeking **one highly skilled SFX Makeup / Practical FX Artist** (or a very small team) with a strong creative eye and a **story-driven approach to practical effects**.

This is a **passion-driven independent feature film**, created by filmmakers investing their own resources to bring a dark, atmospheric story to life. We’re looking for a collaborator who enjoys shaping horror elements through **practical makeup, prosthetics, and blood effects**, while working closely with the director.

**🩸 SFX / MAKEUP SCOPE (PRACTICAL)**

**Note:** All **gunshots and impacts will be created in post-production (VFX)**.

The SFX Makeup Artist will be responsible for **aftermath effects only** (wounds, blood, prosthetics).

• Demonic baby doll face (practical)

• Mary’s face “eaten” by baby (prosthetic / FX)

• Tom — stab wound (hand)

• Tom — knife cut to neck

• Mary repeatedly stabbing Tom during climax (practical blood & wounds)

• **Aftermath of gunshot wounds** (blood, entry/exit wounds, body effects)

• Owl Totem Mask (practical prop / mask)

• Creature / Entity: **Tatakala** (prosthetic / creature design)

• General character makeup for cast

**💰 COMPENSATION**

**Flat Rate:** **$3,000 total (Labor)**
Production will cover all approved materials and fabrication costs separately.

(Estimated 18 days of work including prep + shoot days)

*This is a micro-budget independent production. Lodging and meals are provided during filming.*

**🎭 ROLE REQUIRED**

• **Special Effects / Makeup (SFX) Artist**

**📩 TO APPLY**

Please send:

• Portfolio or reel of SFX / prosthetic work

• Brief note on experience with blood FX and prosthetic makeup

• Location & availability in April 2026

**Email:** david@313-films.com

**Project:** *Lake of the Brokenhearted*

**Director / Producer:** David Jaure

**Production**: 13 Films 

🎥 **Director Demo Reel (Narrative Film Work):**

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL — FEATURE FILM (GEORGIA)**

**LAKE OF THE BROKENHEARTED**

**Filming:** April 2026

**Location:** North Georgia (Lake / Forest / Cabins)

**Format:** Independent Feature Film

**Status:** PAID — **$150 per filming day**

We are now casting **select roles** for our independent feature film **LAKE OF THE BROKENHEARTED**, a character-driven psychological thriller with supernatural elements.

We’re seeking **strong, grounded actors** with natural, emotionally honest performances.

**🎭 **
**AVAILABLE ROLES & FILMING DAYS**

• **TATAKALA** — Female, 30s+ (Physical / Creature Role)

  **Filming:** 2 days

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **ROBERT** — Male, ~10 (Native Kid)

  **Filming:** 2–3 days

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **NATIVE MAN (Gas Station)** — Male, 50s–60s

  **Filming:** 1 day

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **NATIVE GIRL (Gas Station)** — Female, ~5 years old

  **Filming:** 1 day

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **HANDSOME CLIENT** — Male, 40s

  **Filming:** 2–3 days

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **CHUBBY CLIENT** — Male, 40s

  **Filming:** 2–3 days

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **NURSE** — Female, 40s–50s

  **Filming:** 1 day

  **Rate:** $150/day

• **SECURITY** — Male, 30s–50s

  **Filming:** 1 day

  **Rate:** $150/day

**📩 **
**HOW TO SUBMIT**

Please email submissions to:

**📧 david@313-films.com**

Include:

1. Name & Age
2. Current Location (Georgia locals preferred)
3. Headshot + Demo Reel (or self-tape / scene link)
4. Availability in **April 2026**

📌 **IMPORTANT NOTES**

• This is a **NON-SAG independent feature film**

• No lodging or travel provided

• Small, professional crew

• Character breakdowns & audition sides provided upon request

**Director / Producer:** David Jaure

**Production:** 3:13 Films

🎥 **Director Demo Reel (Narrative Film Work):**

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cxxUbmH05FU

* Black tie
* Black dress shoes

**Serious inquiries only.**

Hi all! I’m Raven, 

I’m a character actor based in Vancouver BC Canada, i have dual citizenship and can legally work in the UK 
I know these aren’t all “professional” headshots. But it shows my range. 

I like dark & dry comedy, drama, gritty and everything in between. 

I can do all kinds of accents, Including yes, RP, posh, cockney, American stand, southern and of course Canadian… 
Also open to collaboration on writing. 
Good to be included in this group! 
Lets make movies 🎬✨

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – Athletic Male (30s)**
Paid Video Shoot – Non-union

We are casting a confident, fit male in his 30s for a short-form video shoot promoting a carbon fiber insole.

**What We’re Looking For:**
• Male, 30s
• Lean, athletic build with strong muscle tone
• Comfortable speaking on camera

**Concept:**
The video will be filmed outdoors, waist-up framing. You will be answering a total of 15 questions that appears on screen in an Instagram-style format. The delivery should feel confident, relaxed, and natural — not salesy or stiff.

**Sample Question (Audition Required – Question #3):**
“Can you use them in everyday shoes?” 

**Audition Requirement:**
To apply, please submit a short self-tape of you answering the question above using the provided script in the photo attached. This helps us ensure you’re a strong fit for the tone and delivery style we’re looking for. Please wear a tank top or tight t-shirt so we can see your muscle tone. 

**Location:** TBD
**Shoot Date:** Within the next 2 weeks, weather dependent

**Pay:**
$75 per hour
Minimum 4-hour guarantee

We expect filming to take approximately 2–3 hours. Total time will depend largely on line delivery efficiency, as the camera setup will remain fixed once established.

If interested, please send:
• Headshot or recent photos
• Short audition video answering Question #3
• Your availability within the next 2 weeks

Email - ecomfilmworks@gmail.com 
Subject Line - Insoles Casting 

Thank you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Video Question 3 "Can you use them in everyday shoes?" Answer: I use these both for workouts and my daily shoes. They' re low- low-profile, so they don' t change the shape of the shoe. They work especially well with classic or narrow shoes. You stay stylish, but your feet are supported all day long. That' honestly one of the biggest advantages.'

🎙 CASTING CALL – DUBBING ARTISTS (ENGLISH) 🎬

We are looking for English dubbing artists for a feature film project.

📍 Location: Surrey, BC (in-studio recording)
⏱ Duration: Approximately 1 hour
💰 Compensation: $50 (flat)

Roles Required:

1️⃣ Male Voice Artist (Age 20–30)
 • To dub a young Caucasian male character (23–24 years old)
 • Neutral North American accent preferred
 • Only 2 short dialogues

2️⃣ Female Voice Artist (Age 20–30)
 • To dub a young Black female college student (22–24 years old)
 • Natural, authentic young adult tone
 • Only 3 short dialogues

🎧 Must be comfortable recording in-studio.
📩 Please DM with:
 • Voice sample (English dialogue)
 • Contact number
 • Availability

Serious and committed artists only.
Thank you!

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR YOUNG ACTOR:
Hello, I am looking for a young female actor (age 5-8) to play the role in a student short film. The longline is : 

Benny and Veronika have secretly been rekindling their ex-marriage. But when their 6-year-old daughter, Ivy, walks in on them kissing, the pair are forced to explain their complicated relationship - revealing tensions they’ve tried to ignore.

If interested please contact me for more information. 

Email - j.marsh0120241@arts.ac.uk

topComments.text: No pay or basic expenses information?......
You’ll need a special child performer license.

items.text:
Hi! I'm Yuri and I'm a film music composer from Italy!
If someone here is working on a new film that maybe need a music composer, don't hesitate and write to me... we can discuss about your project! 

Over the years I've scored 1 feature film and 11 short films, 5 of which has won a lot of awards in film festivals all over the world! 

If you have any upcoming project, write me a DM. Have a nice day! 

Here’s a link to my soundtracks:

https://music-yuricrescenzio.bandcamp.com/

items.text:
Casting call!!!!
Hey everyone, I'm just about halfway done casting for my upcoming romance film "A Handful of Love and Demons to Hate" based on a novel just published! The roles listed below are what I'm still in need of, so a character you can portray just send it to the email provided and follow the instructions on the flyer. I can't wait to get started soon and I look forward to everyone's submission. This does take place in GA and filming will start sometime in April. I plan to be finished by mid July. This is non paid however you will receive credit so just letting everyone know. To offset not being able to pay those brining my production together, I will be hosting a wrap up event/party for the last day of filming, offering low price novel copies to the cast instead of regular price, and sending you early access of the finished movie product that way you can see it before it comes out. Also you might have to click on the pictures of the roles because they can look blurry/pixelated at first then they clear up

items.text:
[CASTING CALL]

Hello people!

We're looking for two Black, male actors aged roughly between 25-30 to play the lead roles in our short film, 'Zen'. All travel costs will be covered, food will be provided, and we'll pay a small amount for your time on set. (The film will be entered to festivals!)

Logline: Outside for the first time in his life, a humanoid robot struggles with the simple task of getting milk. Meanwhile, his creator discovers a terrible truth.

Visual concept for the film: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O1kt7Y4fj4k](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O1kt7Y4fj4k&fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHoyXxZdPduUJhj6w_cGlh57G06oMWadd6BJEPMb7kBtz9_N3K0qikVdCFoYt_aem_UA8eANd_sbdtZzFufm-6Cg)

The roles:

Von (shooting in Farnham, Surrey on 16th, 18th & 19th March) - Anxious, reserved and afraid of change. He built a robot named Zen to accompany him in his isolated home.

Zen (shooting in Farnham, Surrey on 17th, 18th & 20th March) - A humanoid robot with childlike curiosity and eagerness for change. Though he looks human, he interprets the world very literally and his speech is stiff and robotic.

If you or anyone you know is interested in either of these roles, please reach out to me here or message my producer at 07393 196080. Be prepared to record a self tape for the role!

Best,

Meadow

Meanwhile, his creator discovers α terrible truth. Contact 07393 196080 23093180 2309318@students.ucreative.c.uok Filming to take place in Farnham, Surrey, March 2026'

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – kobieta o blond włosach -  główny archeolog Ahnenerbe**

 

**Szukamy skarnu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Morskie opowieści’’** poszukuje kobiety do roli niemieckiej pani archeolog  w szukaniu historycznych artefaktów. Najlepiej jakby kandydatka miała **od 35 – 40 lat o blond włosach o szczupłej budowie ciała. **Wszystkie kwestie postaci będą mówione po niemiecku dla lepszego efektu filmu oraz kilka po francusku gdyż będzie scena kiedy archeolog tłumaczy stare dokumenty średniowieczne. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. **Na początku 2025** może będziemy realizować ten mini serial  oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej **‘’Ahnenerbe’’** która chce zdobyć słynny artefakt ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. **Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne**

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

** **

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Szukamy kobiety do roli maszynistki SS!  **

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’**Grupa1940**’’ poszukuje kobiety **w wieku 30 – 40 lat** **o blond włosach** do roli maszynistki/sekretarki do biura oficera Waffen SS najlepiej **o wzroście 170 –175 cm. Postać ta będzie mieć swoje kwestie po niemiecku już w 2 odcinku.**

** **

 Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
🚂 Co dziś naprawdę zagraża zabytkom techniki?

Dyrektor Muzeum Kolejnictwa na Śląsku zwraca uwagę na zagrożenia, o których rzadko mówi się głośno.

Największym wrogiem zabytków techniki bardzo często nie jest czas — lecz cisza.
Cisza wokół decyzji, cisza administracyjna, brak reakcji i odwlekanie rozstrzygnięć. A za tą ciszą nierzadko idą nieodwracalne skutki: decyzje o likwidacji, złomowanie, rozbiórki.

Drugim poważnym zagrożeniem są pożary inwestycyjne — celowe lub wynikające z zaniedbań, które „przypadkiem” torują drogę nowym inwestycjom. Tam, gdzie znika zabytek, łatwiej postawić coś nowego.

Zabytki techniki nie bronią się same.
Potrzebują uwagi, decyzji, odpowiedzialności i odwagi, by powiedzieć: to jest wartość, nie przeszkoda.

Dlatego mówimy głośno.
Bo milczenie bywa najdroższe.

#ZabytkiTechniki #DziedzictwoPrzemysłowe #NieDlaZłomowania #ChronimyDziedzictwo #MuzeumKolejnictwa 🚂

Prestige Performer Collective
We are currently seeking:

1 x Dance Instructor – Bellydance Workshop
📍 Bond Street, London
🗓 18th March
⏰ 17:00 – 17:45

1 x Bellydancer – Ongoing Opportunities
📍 Guildford / Woking (GU)
🗓 Strong availability required for Friday & Saturday evenings
Please include your March & April availability in your application.
Client is open to themed events - additional styles and skills are highly encouraged.

Good rates of pay 💵

To apply, please email your experience, availability, and performance footage to:
👇🏼
abbie.murdoch@prestigeperformercollective.com

Please do not DM.

items.text:
**HERES WHAT WE OFFER**

* Recording studio with the ability to record everything except live drums, in-house. 

* Project work including tracks, intros, outros, and mashups, key changes, shortening/lengthening tracks. 

* Songwriting services including music, lyrics, production & arrangements of your own songs. 

* Arrangements, production, mixing and mastering. 

*Moving graphics for stage, animated posters & animated social promotion. 

* Also offering photographic services, including camera work and full editing & manipulation.

* Literally hundreds of projects completed for all sorts of artists covering all sorts of genres.

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

Hi everyone, I’ve just relocated from Saigon to London and am currently open to collaborating with models, stylists, MUAs, and creative teams across the UK.

I’m an editorial and high-fashion photographer with experience shooting for celebrities, designers, and commercial clients in Vietnam, and I’m looking to build strong creative relationships here in London.

I’m open to:

 • Paid commissions

 • Test shoots

 • Editorial collaborations

 • Portfolio building with strong concepts

If you’re a model or creative who wants to create striking editorial work together, feel free to DM or email.

items.text:
# **REAP LOVE: SHORT FILM CASTING CALL **
> ***"What would happen if the Grim Reaper falls in love?"***

Hi guys, hope you are all well! 

Currently, I am producing a short film called ‘Reap Love’, and we are casting one of our main actors, “The Reaper”, for this short film! 

**LOGLINE**: When the Grim Reaper meets a girl in a near-death experience, he must choose between love and his soul-collecting job

**LEAD ROLE** “The Reaper”: (Lead, Male, 20-29): Tim Burton-like appearance. Preferably tall around 5'10 - 6'0. This is a non-dialogue role, focused on good control of facial expression. The character is a loner who is emotionally numb, buried in his job and closed off to the world around him. Later, towards the end of the film, he begins to learn to express his emotions through the love he finds unexpectedly (additionally, there is one kiss scene included in this film)

This is a non-dialogue role with the focus in good control with facial and bodily expression

**REQUIRED MEDIA**: Headshot/Photo, Video Reel, Resume

**SHOOT LOCATIONS**: Focused in Farnham & Guildford 

**SHOOT DATES**: Monday 2nd March - Friday 6th March 2026 

**COMPENSATION**: Unpaid, but Travel & Catering will be covered and provided for the shoot week. 

I have linked the Mandy and Backstage casting platforms for anyone interested in the main role: 

**MANDY**: [[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3103444/reap-love/?role_id=5469086](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3103444/reap-love/?role_id=5469086)](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3103444/reap-love/?role_id=5469086)

**BACKSTAGE**: [[https://www.backstage.com/casting/reap-love-3104102/](https://www.backstage.com/casting/reap-love-3104102/)](https://www.backstage.com/casting/reap-love-3104102/)

Please contact me as soon as possible (either by the casting platforms, Facebook platform or via email renee_sugui@hotmail.com) if you are interested or know anyone else who would be interested to be onboard with this film! 

Many thanks !! xx

items.text:
Du willst spielen – weißt aber nicht, wo du anfangen sollst? 🎭

Viele träumen vom Schauspiel. Wenige wissen, wie der erste Schritt wirklich aussieht.

In unserem 6-wöchigen virtuellen Schauspielkurs lernst du die Grundlagen, die wirklich zählen:
• Rollen verstehen
• Texte lebendig machen
• authentisch im Moment bleiben
• sicher vor der Kamera oder im digitalen Raum auftreten

- Live via Zoom.
- Mit fester Gruppe.
- Mit klarer Struktur.
- Ohne Leistungsdruck – aber mit Anspruch.

Egal, ob du neu startest oder nach einer Pause wieder einsteigen möchtest – hier bekommst du einen professionellen Rahmen für deinen Einstieg.

📅 Start: 22. April 2026
👥 Max. 10 Plätze
💡 Frühbucher-Vorteil bis 01. März

Alle Infos findest du hier: [https://schauspielwerkstatt-berlin.de/schauspielkurs/](https://schauspielwerkstatt-berlin.de/schauspielkurs/)

Wir freuen uns auf dich.

items.text:
Hi everyone! I’m officially open to taking on new roles for 2026 🎬
About me - I’m returning as a guest star in Netflix’s 'Geek Girl' season two, and I have upcoming lead roles in four features (Apple TV and Prime). Previous credits include a lead in double BAFTA nominated Netflix show 'A Whole Lifetime', guest starring in 'Ted Lasso', and leads in several award-winning shorts. 

I also work with the United Nations as an ambassador for human rights in the film industry and recently shot the cover of Vogue (fun fact!☺️)

I’m able to work in multiple countries, originating from the UK and currently residing in LA. Pleased message for reels if interested!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID MUSIC VIDEO (LONDON)**

Male actor required for a paid, one-day apocalyptic-themed music video shoot in central London this spring.

Reference photo from Terminator 2. The scene before LA is nuked. This short film will be set in an empty post-apocalyptic London city (without the nukes).

• One-character shoot
• Non-speaking role
• Playing age: 20–28
• Must be confident on rollerblades or roller skates
• Ideally 5'8" or taller

To apply, please DM:
1. One headshot
2. A video showreel. Please note, submissions without a showreel will not be considered.

Shortlisting will take place over the next month. All applicants will be contacted once the shortlist is finalised. Thanks.

This is an independent production and an unpaid opportunity, but a great chance to gain credit and be part of an exciting project.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – COMMUNITY NOTICE

We’re student filmmakers casting our final short film, Community Notice  set during a community meeting about a missing cat, and the tensions that quietly surface in the room.

We’re looking for strong, naturalistic performers across a range of roles. 

📍 Filming in Belfast
💰 Paid 

As this is an independent student production, we’re also currently fundraising to support the film’s production costs. If you’d like to support the project.

https://gofund.me/f58297f42

To apply, send your headshot, showreel (if available), and a short introduction to:
📩 communitynoticeshortfilm@gmail.com

Selected applicants will receive self - tape materials 

Thanks 
Lucy Young 
(Writer & Director)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call CHAIRPERSON Any gender Playing age 20-45 Procedural. Measured. Clinging to order. Knows this meeting isn't about cat - - and doesn't want it t to go there. A restrained, controlled performance. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshorfim@gmail.com short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call Declan Male| Playinga age 18-25 Restless. Slightly defensive. Detached on the surface. Carries more awareness than he lets show. Looking for subtle internal tension rather than overt attitude. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshotim@gmail.co short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call PATRICK Male Playing age 55-70 Blunt. Defensive. Certain he's being practical. Represents a generation that mistakes emotional distance for strength. This role requires subtlety not villain. • How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and a short introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshotilm@gmail.com Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

Needs naturalistic delivery and quiet comedic timing. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshotim@gmail.c short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. Filming in Belfast Dates: TBC Paid role'

May be an image of text that says 'Casting Call ROSE Female|Playing.age45-60 Playing age Quiet. Watchful. Says very little. Feels like she knows more than she lets on. A presence role. Strong screen stillness essential. How to Apply: Send your headshot, showreel you have one), and introduction about yourself to communitynoticeshorfilm@gmail.co short Selected actors will be sent sides from the script. items.text:
For LA Actresses & Creatives

Preparing for castings, self-tapes, or on-set work?

If your wardrobe doesn’t reflect the roles you’re ready to book, I offer structured style alignment sessions focused on:

• Defining your casting range visually
• Silhouette and proportion analysis
• Character-aligned outfit formulas
• A focused shopping direction
• A cohesive off-screen image

This is a strategy-based session designed to help you show up with clarity, intention, and confidence.

Shopping and sourcing are available separately.

DM me if you’d like more details.

Greetings, just introducing myself to the group. I'm a multi-hyphenate focusing mostly on writing at the moment. I just released this resource for actors. 

If you can use some extra ammunition to set you apart from the herd, there are a great range of monologues from comic to dramatic. I'll even send a starving actor a read-only link in exchange for feedback to support the cause. Just message me!😀

items.text:
Hi everyone,

I’m producing a short film called *Compromised Oath* with Vancouver Film School!

Please note: **Self-tapes are actually due February 25th.** 

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.

Thank you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ក្កឺ FILM SCHOOL VANCOUVER 6 CASTING CALL DET. MOSSBERG SUPPORTING MALE 140-50 OPEN ETHNICITY PLEASE SUBMIT HEADSHOTS, RESUMES AND DEMO REELS TO COMPROMISEDOATH.SHORTFLMGMAL.O PLEASE INDICATE IND CATE WHICH ROLE(S) YOU WOULD LIKE TO AUDITION FOR.'

May be a doodle of text that says 'Character Bio World-weary at 45, he has seen his share of violence and disregard for life on the streets of Vancouver. From his start as an officer, and now working as a detective, he is still incisive and curious. Arriving in the story to inject another layer of paranoia, he's friendly and suspicious without being outwardly threatening.'

items.title: Hi everyone,

items.text:
LIFE IN RECORD CASTING CALL - Paid
Produced by Hidden Valley Entertainment & Black Spark Productions

Written by Jacob Ellis

Directed by Jacob Ellis

Please Send Headshots, Reel, and Resume to Lifeinrecordfilm@gmail.com

Due Date: Friday, February 27th, 8:00PM

Shoot length: 5 days from April 28th - May 3rd

Film Location: Kelowna, BC

Script length: 14 pages

Travel, Accommodations, and Food will be covered

Pay: IMDB credit, Reel footage, Deferred pay as well as residuals. Rate can be negotiated. 

Synopsis: Arthur Erikson led a tumultuous life, and an even more challenging after life. After `arriving in purgatory, Arthur meets Angel, his case manager. Who leads him on a journey to reflect upon actions he took in his life by listening to cassette recordings of his life. Their relationship shifts between arguing to comradery. Leading Arthur to make the decision whether to damn himself to heaven or to hell.

Trigger warnings: Discusses SA, no nudity required nor will it be shown, simply talked about.

Arthur Erikson: Male, Mid 20s - Early 30s. Thinks highly of himself, working in pharmaceutical sales. Wreathed in toxic masculinity, throughout the short his shields break down revealing a more sensitive person. Dressed in business casual, Put together. Will require a scruffy beard and shaving throughout the shoot.

Please Send Headshots, Reel, and Resume to Lifeinrecordfilm@gmail.com

Calling actors, vocalists, performers, and presenters 

I’m booking people for our Studio Social Portrait Sessions at Skia Fos Studio. (Southend, Essex) 

You’ll get:
• 2-hour portrait session
• Paid sit
• Finished images included
• A relaxed session and creative networking

Question: “Is this just for full-time performers?”
Answer: No. If you’re building your portfolio, you’re welcome.

We run two Saturday mornings and two Wednesday evenings per month.
Interested? Message me with: social portrait

items.text: 🎭 Repertuar marzec–czerwiec 2026 już dostępny – „Plagiat”, „Dwanaście scen z życia Matki”, „Trzy wesołe świnki”, „Diablice w opałach” i więcej na Scenie MDK w Galerii Rumia (poziom +1) – bilety online na kupbilecik.pl i w MDK Rumia! 🎟🔥

sharedPost.text:
‼️PRZYPOMINAJKA PONIEDZIAŁKOWA‼️

 🎭🔥 RUSZYŁ REPERTUAR MARZEC–CZERWIEC 2026! 🔥🎭

I tak – można już planować wiosnę z teatrem!

📍 Scena MDK | Galeria Rumia | poziom +1

Co gramy?

🔎 PLAGIAT – komedia kryminalna (PRAPREMIERA 27.03!)
Nowa stylistyka, nowe twarze i zwroty akcji, po których długo nie zaśniecie.

🌿 Eko Zgubek na planecie Ziemia – familijny spektakl ekologiczny (wstęp wolny)

🎭 Dwanaście scen z życia Matki – nasz hit komediowy wraca w kwietniu!

🐷 Trzy wesołe świnki – PREMIERA! Cyrkowo-kabaretowa propozycja dla rodzin z dziećmi.

🔥 Diablice w opałach – wielki finał sezonu w czerwcu!

⚠️ Z doświadczenia wiemy jedno:
Najpierw „jeszcze jest czas”…
A potem „czy są jakieś wolne dwa miejsca?”.

🎟 Bilety online: kupbilecik.pl
🎟 Stacjonarnie: MDK Rumia, ul. Mickiewicza 19

Jeśli planujecie teatr wiosną – to jest moment.
Najlepsze miejsca znikają jako pierwsze.

Kto widzimy w tym sezonie? 👇
Dajcie znać i udostępnijcie znajomym, z którymi chcecie przyjść! 🎭✨

#PomorskiTeatrNobilis #Rumia #Repertuar #Teatr2026 #Plagiat #DiabliceWOpałach #DwanaścieScen #TrzyWesołeŚwinki

items.text:
KRAKÓW - STATYŚCI - 11.03-19.03

Witam,

Szukam statystów do projektu badawczego - nagrania służące uczeniu algorytmów w branży automotive. Uczestnicy są anonimowi, a nagrania jedynie do użytku wewnętrznego klienta.

Szukamy:
* Kobiet i mężczyzn w każdym wieku. **Stawka: **120 zł. Nagrania trwają 1,5h. 
* Kobiet i mężczyzn o pochodzeniu etnicznym, zwłaszcza azjatyckim.  **Stawka: **150 zł. Nagrania trwają 1,5h. 

**Gdzie: **Kraków, Powstańców Wielkopolskich.

**Kiedy: **każdy może wziąć udział jeden raz, między 11.03 a 19.03, w godz. 8:00-17:00. 

**Zgłoszenia **proszę przesyłać tylko poprzez formularz: https://forms.fillout.com/t/xdfx89Gtcnus

items.text:
Du willst als Schauspieler:in ernst genommen werden? Aber du hast keine Ausbildung?
Eine Schauspielschule in Vollzeit kommt für dich gerade nicht infrage.

Job. Miete. Alltag. Realität.

Vielleicht kennst du diese Gedanken:

„Ohne Ausbildung nimmt mich sowieso niemand ernst.“

„Ich bin Quereinsteiger:in, ich habe ja nichts vorzuweisen.“

„Für eine richtige Schauspielschule ist es jetzt zu spät.“

Gerade hier im Raum Köln gibt es viele Talente, die genau daran scheitern, nicht am Können. 

Die Wahrheit ist:

Was dich ernstzunehmend macht, ist nicht der Titel auf dem Papier sondern saubere Grundlagen, Technik, Präsenz und professionelle Vorbereitung.

Und genau deshalb haben wir eine berufsbegleitende Schauspielausbildung in Abendform aufgebaut. Speziell für Menschen, die arbeiten, aber ihren Traum nicht aufgeben wollen.

Mich würde interessieren:

Wer hier aus Köln oder Umgebung träumt davon im Bereich Schauspiel zu arbeiten hat aber keine klassische Ausbildung?

Ich erkläre dir gern, wie du professionell starten kannst, ohne deinen Job aufzugeben.

Schreib **„Acting“** in die Kommentare oder schreib mir eine Nachricht.

sharedPost.text:
---

🌀🎬🎥🌚 Exclusive Acting Workshop – Final Version .version A.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype

"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name

🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

---

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.

---

🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach)

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill

📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):

1. Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."

2. The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"

3. Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.

4. Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.

5. Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call

📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

---

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable

🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point

📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision.

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

---

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew

🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.

Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)

🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

---

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape

📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:

1. Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.

2. Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.

3. Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:

1. Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

2. Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.

3. Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux

📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

---

Final Performance (Day 4):

Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

---

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?

This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:

mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com

Let’s create something unforgettable.

items.text:
Hi there! Just wanted some advice on this, I’m a drama graduate and I really want to get into the casting and talent management side of the industry. The dream is to become a casting assistant/PA and work my way up to be a casting director one day! I’m based in the North West but all the vacancies I’ve been seeing on CGD and PMA have all been London based. 
Please let me know if any tips or anyone I can get into contact with regarding this. 
Thank you in advance!

topComments.text: Speak to LA productions and other independent companies. They might have some work experience vacancies.

# **URGENT TALENT CALL FOR FEBRUARY 23RD – FBI AGENTS – VERNON, CA**

We are urgently casting **2 male talent** to portray FBI agents for a Streamer's Promo Video on **February 23, 2026**.

We’re looking for talent with a **lanky, fit build** — overall the classic, stereotypical FBI agent look. Clean-cut, professional presence, and comfortable portraying authority on camera.

**📍Location:** Vernon, CA
**⏱️Call Time:** estimated 8:30AM – 7:00PM (will likely wrap earlier)
**💲Rate:** $250
**Client:** Twitch streamer

**Food provided**
**Non-Union**

**Wardrobe Requirements:**
Please bring your own:
* White button-up dress shirt
* Black slacks
* Black tie
* Black dress shoes

**Serious inquiries only.**

items.text:
CASTING CALL!! HENRY'S GHOST - A COVID-19 STORY
# A lonely widower, driven by the aftermath of COVID-19 isolation, attempts to prove to his son the presence of a spirit haunting his flat, whom he quietly believes to be his wife.

Short Film (15 minutes)

DRAMA 

Manchester-based only!

Travel + Catering provided 

Filming Mid-April 

From Director ***Jacob James Ward*** with previous works such as *'Fallowfield' *and *'he lives here'* which are currently on the festival circuit, comes a film experience with foundations deep within the essential worker communities affected by COVID-19. 

CASTING FOR
# ***HENRY STONE ***
## ***45 - 55 YEARS OLD ***
## ***MALE***
## ***ANY ETHNICITY ***

Henry, a veteran bus driver struggling with survivors guilt, lives as a stoic, working class representation of the mismanagement of the COVID era in the UK. While working as a bus driver at the height of COVID, Henry slowly saw the toll the pandemic had on his social infrastructure - losing friends, and eventually, his wife.  Now, years later with little attempt to process his tragic loss, he makes an attempt to fill the void created by his loneliness by slowly falling down the rabbit hole of conspiracy theories and is disillusioned by the prospect of a ghost living in his flat who he believes to be his late wife. In a desperate attempt, he tries to convince it's existence to his son. 

# ***JAMES STONE ***
## ***20 - 25 YEARS OLD ***
## ***MALE ***
## ***ANY ETHNICITY ***

Despite living a life surviving it all, Henry can now only be saved by his lone son - James.

James, burdened by the pressures of university, his job and his father's declining mental state, represents the loss of youth and importance of growing responsibility brought on by COVID for young people. James sorely wants to reconnect with his father and help them both move on from the death of James' mother. James must convince his father to stop looking for the dead and start talking to the living - which is easier said than done. 

# *EXTRAS WANTED!!*
## ***20 - 60 YEARS OLD ***
## ***ANY GENDER ***
## ***ANY ETHNICITY ***

We are seeking extras to portray Henry's co-workers in a key sequence that explores and visualises his grief and survivor's guilt. 

If you're interested in being part of this important scene and enhancing the world that we are building, please get in touch!!

***CREW:***

DIRECTOR - JJ Ward 

PRODUCER - George Grant 

CINEMATOGRAPHER - Jack Gaskell 

EDITOR - Matthew Wadham 

SOUND DESIGNER - Jacob Kelly 

Our entire crew has a powerful personal connection to COVID, with myself (the Director) having been locked down during my formative years between GCSEs and A-LEVELs. Many more of you out there will have your own Covid story and we'd love to hear from you!

If this sounds like something you'd be interested working on, with an experienced crew looking to take this to film festivals and beyond, then please get in touch! We'll be sending over script segments and asking for self tapes at this time, with studio auditions to come later :) 

Short Film (15 minutes)

DRAMA 

Manchester-based only!

Travel + Catering provided 

Filming Mid-April 

SPEAK SOON!

CONTACTS:
* Message me on this account :)
* Email the director: jacobward044@gmail.com
* Email the producer: georgefgrant@icloud.com

JAMES STONE MALE 20-25 YEARS OLD ETHNICITY: ANY JAMES, BURDENED BY THE PRESSURES OF UNIVERSITY, HIS JOB AND HIS FATHER'S MENTAL STATE, REPRESENTS THE LOSS OF YOUTH AND IMPORTANCE OF GROWING RESPONSIBILITY BROUGHT ON BY COVID FOR YOUNG PEOPLE. FILMING EARLY To MID APRIL CONTACT INFO: GEORGEFGRANT GEORGEFGRANT@ICLOUD.COM @ICLOUD.COM'

items.text:
Looking for a freelance videographer (not an agency) in Los Angeles who understands Facebook/Instagram ad creatives with strong hooks.

This is for a dog training business. Highly trained dogs, outdoor filming, action-based content. I need someone who knows how to structure videos for attention and conversions — not cinematic promo or wedding style.

What I’m looking for:
• Short-form vertical video (Reels / FB ads / TikTok)
• Experience with paid social or direct-response content
• Able to help with hooks / concepts
• Freelancer only (no agencies or production companies)
• LA based

Please comment or DM with:
 1. Examples of ad creatives you’ve made
 2. Your rate (half day / full day)
 3. Availability

Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.

items.text:
🎬CASTING🎬 ETIUDA WARSZAWSKIEJ SZKOŁY FILMOWEJ
Film jest intymną sceną między Julią, która właśnie ma wyjść za człowieka, którego nie kocha, a Piotrkiem, jubilerem pomagającym jej w wyborze obrączek ślubnych. 

Poszukujemy odtwórców ról:

▫️Julia - 25-28 lat, delikatna, sympatyczna dziewczyna

▫️Piotrek - 25-28 lat, przystojny, dobry chłopak, budzący zaufanie

▫️Narzeczony - 27-30 lat, pseudo-elegancki zapatrzony w siebie i swoją karierę, mający siebie za kogoś niezwykle ważnego, żałosny 

✨️Projekt nonprofit, okazja do wzbogacenia swojego portfolio 

Zgłoszenie proszę przesłać na adres: martynabrzezkiewicz@onlineszkolafilmowa.com.pl 

📩Treść maila powinna zawierać:

▫️Imię i nazwisko

▫️Wiek

▫️Aktualne zdjęcie

▫️Dane kontaktowe 

▫️Informację o doświadczeniu aktorskim 

🗓 termin: 14 marca 

📍Piaseczno - zapewniamy transport z Warszawy

items.text:
Hello,

We are currently looking for male strippers who would be available to work with us on a freelance basis from time to time, both in Bangkok and Phuket. When we have confirmed bookings, we will contact you directly. At the moment, we are in the process of building a roster of performers who are able to take on this type of work for private parties and events.

Typically, the rate we offer male strippers is around 5,000 THB per hour. For certain events, the compensation may be higher depending on the client budget and what we are able to charge additionally.

We are particularly interested in performers who have a good profile, are professional, and can deliver an exciting performance that creates a memorable and enjoyable experience for our clients.

If you are available for this type of work, please feel free to contact me via WhatsApp at +66 98 665 0245, or you may send your information through my Facebook inbox.

items.title: Hello,

items.text:
Stell dir vor, du wirst endlich als Schauspieler ernst genommen.

Genau das ist der Punkt, an dem viele Quereinsteiger stehen, die eigentlich für die Bühne oder die Kamera bestimmt sind – aber nie die richtige Möglichkeit bekommen haben.

Dieses Jahr öffnen wir wieder Plätze in unserer berufsbegleitenden Schauspielausbildung. Und ehrlich gesagt suchen wir keine „perfekten Lebensläufe“.

Wir suchen echte Persönlichkeiten.

Menschen mit Ecken, Kanten, Geschichten.

Menschen, die schon lange spüren, dass mehr in ihnen steckt.

Vielleicht bist genau du jemand, der bisher übersehen wurde.

Vielleicht hat dir nur der richtige Rahmen gefehlt, um dein Talent ernsthaft zu entwickeln.

Wenn dich das anspricht, schreib mir einfach „**Schauspiel**“ in die Kommentare oder schick mir eine Nachricht und erzähl mir kurz von dir.

items.text:
I am looking for a student to join me on a YouTube project in London 🌆

The role involves approaching people in the street, asking a set of prepared questions on camera 🎤, and having short, natural conversations. It is light, fun, and engaging work, but you should feel confident speaking to strangers and comfortable on camera 🙂

You should be a native English speaker (or very close), cheerful, outgoing, and positive ✨

Filming sessions are usually 6 to 8 hours per day ⏰ and this will be an ongoing project.

I offer £13 per hour (ONO) 💷 plus paid lunch 🍔

If this sounds like something you would enjoy, please send me a DM with a short introduction about yourself 📩

*HASTER*

Vi har fået nogle afbud til optagelser i morgen, og vil derfor høre om der er nogen der har lyst til at være med på optagelser i morgen i KBH K.

Vi skal lave en brandfilm for dansk fodboldklub.

Optagelserne finder sted mellem kl. 11.30 og 16.00 i København K.

Man skal være over 21 år. 

Jobbet er lønnet med 500 DKK. 

Send gerne en mail med billede, alder og telefon nummer, hvis der interesseret - så vender jeg tilbage hvis det bliver aktuelt :) 

statist@baconcph.com

De bedste hilsner,
Nana

Kommentiere mit ❤️ für den Link.

items.text:
POTNIA THERON de HÉLIA CORREIA

27 FEVEREIRO A 7 MARÇO
Quarta a Sábado às 21h30

AUDITÓRIO MUNICIPAL DO
FÓRUM CULTURAL DO SEIXAL

info e reservas 932 195 570 | reservas.teatrodaterra@gmail.com

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal, Biblioteca Municipal e em BOL.PT:
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/172158-potnia_theron_de_helia_correia-aud_m_forum_c_seixal/

POTNIA THERON do grego antigo “Senhora dos animais” é um epíteto e um motivo artístico milenar que descreve a divindade feminina com domínio absoluto sobre a natureza selvagem. O termo aparece pela primeira vez na Ilíada de Homero, para descrever a deusa Ártemis, sendo, no entanto, um conceito muito mais antigo, com raízes em divindades femininas da Idade do Bronze e até do Neolítico.
Hélia Correia escritora consagrada, escreve de um rasgo, este poema épico inédito, a partir da antiguidade clássica, para o espectáculo que Maria João Luís encena como uma opereta não convencional, abordando e reflectindo sobre as relações de forças entre os géneros masculino e feminino.

​com
MARIA JOÃO LUÍS, SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO, ANTÓNIO LOURENÇO MENEZES

cenografia JOSÉ MANUEL CASTANHEIRA 
música original JOSÉ PEIXOTO
desenho de luz, fotografia PEDRO DOMINGOS
assistência de encenação
BEATRIZ VIEIRA DE CARVALHO

encenação MARIA JOÃO LUÍS

assistência de produção FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA
direção de produção PEDRO DOMINGOS

produção TEATRO DA TERRA 2026 | M/12

parceria
Municipio do Seixal 

Apoio
República Portuguesa - Cultura, juventude, desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

Currently planning a student film around the 16th - 22nd March (more dates planned in early April but TBC)

This is a story about the fear of growing up too quick and how it's not a bad thing to have that child-like wonder in everything.

Contact: adamwilliamson2803@gmail.com if you are interested!

items.text:
Casting Call | Channel 4 Documentary
Participants Needed

We are casting a new Channel 4 documentary exploring the power of movement — and how it can help us rebuild, reconnect and find belonging.

We’d like to hear from LGBTQ+ individuals who have had to leave home and start again elsewhere because of their sexuality, and who have found — or are still searching for — confidence, community or healing through movement.

This could be anything from walking, swimming or dancing to climbing, running, team sports, or simply finding a way to step back into the world.

If this speaks to your experience, we’d love to hear your story.

Please send your contact details and an outline of your story to:
casting@casperblackcasting.com

If this isn’t you but it reminds you of someone — a teammate, friend, student or member of your community — we would be grateful if you shared it. Some stories need an invitation.

Casper Black Casting is known for sensitive, ethical, story-led casting that puts people first.
[www.casperblackcasting.com]

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of yoga, dancing and text

items.title: Casting Call

items.text:
Hi there, I'm a University of South Wales film student, and I'm currently seeking actors for our film project on underrepresented cinema.

Our film: “Blossom” Is about Peter a retired solicitor hiring the service of Llewellyn a handyman to set up a flower bed for his garden, over the coming days, Peter and Llewellyn learns that they may have more in common than they initially realise, however Peter is questioning if that spark is more than just being friends, but as a man that’s found it difficult to form connections little loner friendship how will Peter approach this curveball? And does Llewellyn see Peter as more than just a friend?

Our Filming Days are between the first and the 29th of March. Based on the convenience of the best time for the companies of our potential locations, we will have an exact date closer to the time.

If you're interested, then please feel free to reach out to our director, Isabel [30128039@students.southwales.ac.uk](mailto:30128039@students.southwales.ac.uk)

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'University of South Wales casting called for Blossom Ages from 50s to Agesfrom50sto70s 70s Llewellyn Overly Friendly, Joyful, Sociable Peter Reserve, Cautious, Gentle Based in Cardiff and Newport, shooting window is from the lst to 29th of March. Please send an email to our Director: 30128039@students.southwales.c.u southwales.'

**EXTRAS — With A Twist Casting Call (30+ needed!)**

Hi everyone! We’re looking for **30+ extras** for the short film **With A Twist**.

**Location:** The Bearded Monk, 122 E McKinney St, Denton, TX 76201

**Date:** Sunday, March 1st
 **Time:** 10pm – 6am

**Wardrobe:** Casual
* **No copyright logos**
* Please wear **gray, black, white, or brown** attire

 **Requirements:**
* **18+**
* **Unpaid role**
* **No speaking lines**
* Scene takes place **at a bar**
* **All genders & ethnicities welcome**

items.text:
CASTING CALL 🎬
We are 5th year MA students from University of Asia and the Pacific, and we are inviting you to be part of our 15 Min Short Film!

Handa ka na bang maging bahagi ng isang kuwentong puno ng alaala at muling pagkikita? 🎥

🗓 Application Period: February 20–25�

📧 Send applications to: primaproductions8@gmail.com�

✉️ Subject line format: CHARACTER – YOUR NAME�Ex: ALBA – MARIA AQUINO

🎬 Final shooting dates: 3rd week of March

📌 Kindly check our pubmats for more details�

⚠️ NOTE: This short film is a student-led project, PURELY FOR ACADEMIC PURPOSES

 LOGLINE: 

After the passing of his separated wife, an estranged father reconnects with his daughter after nearly a decade. The two live in different worlds, the daughter works in corporate, making a name for herself in her industry while the father is near rock bottom. In a desperate attempt to feel closer to her, the father recreates meals that the late mother has made in the past. Each meal recalling a simpler time, with tastes and flavors the daughter had nearly forgotten, slowly reconnecting her to her childhood.

Prima Productions is looking for actors who can portray:

🎭 ARTURO (Father, late 40s)�• Height: 5’6–5’10�• Preferably moreno (open to all complexions)�• Can speak Tagalog (English is a plus)�• Musically gifted is a plus (singing or playing instruments such as guitar or piano)�

Character: A broken yet hopeful father trying to reconnect with his daughter through food, memories, and music.

🎭 ALBA (Daughter, mid-20s)�• Height: 5’3–5’6�• Preferably morena (open to all complexions)�• Can speak both Tagalog and English�

Character: A driven corporate professional carrying emotional distance from her past, slowly rediscovering warmth and nostalgia.

The two live in different worlds, the daughter works in corporate, making a name for herself in her industry while the father is near rock bottom. In a desperate attempt to feel closer to her, the father recreates meals that the late mother has made in the past. Each meal recalling a simpler time, with tastes and flavors the daughter had nearly forgotten, slowly reconnecting her to her childhood.'

items.text: I aften lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg forhindrede også mine børn i at spise det. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

items.text:
The Good Old Days
https://calendly.com/jayhubert/2026-uccs-capstone-auditions-march-1

Genre: Comedy/Drama 

Logline: Zack has an interaction with a stranger after months stuck at home with his friend Daniel. Throughout the story, we learn how strong the fear of the outside world can be, causing Zack to fight through challenges to achieve his goal of going out to a party. While Daniel goes through multiple lengths, even illegal, to make sure Zack does not achive his goals.

Roles: Zack (21-28 years old) - Male, any ethnicity.

Zack is an introvert who has been afraid of the outside world. He knows how converse and interact with humans and craves connection to the world outside, but due to Daniels bad influence on him he needs to fight for it.

Daniel (21-28 years old) - Male, any ethnicity

Daniel is a force of fear. He is over the top afraid anathing that may happen outside the house. Even going through huge lengths, sometimes even illegal acts, to make sure Zack will not achieve his goals.

Ed (21-30 years old) - Male, any ethnicity 

Ed is a laid back, delivery driver. He is put into Zack's life to challenge him to go outside and attend the party he invites him to. Zack is a people person who likes talking to others.

Directed & Written: Luca Mendes

Producer: Journey Forrest

Production Type: Student Capstone Short Film.

Contact Information: thegoodolddaysfilm@gmail.com

Run time: Short film (7-8 min)

Compensation: Non-Paid, Non-Union

Audition Information: March 1st, 2026, 11am to 7pm.

Shooting Date: March 28th, 2026. (Must be available all day)

https://calendly.com/jayhubert/2026-uccs-capstone-auditions-march-1
