items.text:
Casting Call 
Project Title: MIDNIGHT Production Type: 

Independent Short Film Filming Dates: Beginning early August Location: Local hire only

We are currently seeking a talented Afro-Latina actress for a leading role in an upcoming independent short film.

Role Requirements:
* Female, Afro-Latina
* Ages 19–26
* Height between 5’0” and 5’5”
* Must be local to the filming area
* Strong emotional range and ability to convey internal conflict through subtle, nonverbal performance

Project Details:
This is an unpaid opportunity however we will provide:
* On-set meals
* Transportation assistance if needed
* Professional footage for your reel
* A collaborative and supportive creative environment

Filming is scheduled to begin in early August, with exact dates to be confirmed.
We are looking for a dedicated performer who is passionate about storytelling and committed to bringing depth and authenticity to the role.

To Submit: Jonathan.tank59@gmail.com Please send your headshot, resume (if available) and a brief introduction and Include “Casting Submission (Your Name)” in the subject line.

We are looking for a dedicated performer who is passionate about storytelling and committed to bringing depth and authenticity to the role.

To Submit: Jonathan.tank59@gmail.com Please send your headshot, resume (if available) and a brief introduction and Include “Casting Submission (Your Name)” in the subject line.
items.title: Casting Call

items.text:
Hi, I’m taking 3 private clients this week for a focused wardrobe session.

We can either:
• review your current wardrobe and rebuild strong, flattering outfits from what you already own
or
• create complete looks for specific events, work, travel, or everyday life — and, if needed, I can curate new pieces for you to purchase.

Everything is tailored personally, 1:1.

If you’ve been feeling stuck with your style or want to elevate how you show up, message me and I’ll share the details.

items.text:
!!CASTING CALL!!

Male – Black (18-22)

Female – Black (22-30)

Characters

Nate Fincher: Still dealing with the death of his mother and the guilt that comes along with grief. He wishes to go back and change the outcome, even though he knows he can’t.

Teri Fincher: Nate’s older sister, she’s a hospital worker who’s using work as a way to keep herself busy.

This film will be shooting in the Metro-Detroit area March 6th-8th later in the day.

Dreamology: Nate sits in front of the TV alone, again. At first, it seems like another stale night. Enter, Dream·ol·o·gy, a late night show hosted by the indoctrinated Jeremy Pickett. During the show Nate learns of an ethereal concept known as dream-phazing, which allows you to enter an altered state of dreaming. Why? To revisit past memories in hopes of experiencing new outcomes. What Nate soon learns however, is that the line between dreams and reality can be easily blurred, especially when paired with unresolved grief. Will he wake up?

🌺✨ MODEL CASTING, RUNWAY & Free Eco Lux Organic Body Air brush WORKSHOP ✨🌺

Are you ready to step into your power and walk the global stage?

This is your opportunity to train, elevate, and prepare for the 2026 World Fashion Expo Hawai‘i at the Marriott Waikīkī Resort & Spa on March 15, 2026.

We are calling serious, disciplined, and committed models who are ready to grow, learn, and represent on an international level, for the past 33 years, every season we showcase twice a year in  New York to London, Milan, Paris, Berlin, Los Angeles, Miami, and Hawai‘i.

🔥 This is more than a casting this is elite runway preparation.

🔴 DATES & TIMES

Casting & Model Workshop
🚨 February 22, 2026
2:00pm-5:00pm
5:00pm-7:00pm

March 7, 2026 | 5:00–7:00 PM

March 13 & 14 | 3:30–8:00 PM

📍 Location: Ola Ka‘ilima ARTSPACE, Loft Room 332📞 CALL ONLY: (808) 726-4614

Come prepared. Come focused. Come ready to work.

🌟 Train with purpose.🌟 Walk with power.🌟 Own the runway.

#ModelCastingCall #RunwayWorkshop #InternationalRunway #FashionWeekPrep #GlobalFashion #ParadiseIslandFashionWeek
